svg.title: Mermaid specialised participant visuals
svg.desc: Demonstrates specialised Mermaid participant kinds rendered with distinct header icons. From the project root, regenerate this Mermaid transform and SVG with: node sequencer.js --mermaid -i test/mermaid-features/22-specialised-participant-visuals/input.mmd -o -f -t test/mermaid-features/22-specialised-participant-visuals
svg.text: Demonstrates specialised Mermaid participant kinds rendered with distinct header icons.
From the project root, regenerate this Mermaid transform and SVG with:
5. Gather related rows [Mermaid: FlowController->>CollectionsNode: Gather related rows]
